provenance.source: DESI Collaboration (2024), DESI 2024 III: Baryon Acoustic Oscillations from Galaxies and Quasars
provenance.notes: Angle-averaged BAO measurements D_V/r_d from DESI Year 1 data release. All uncertainties are 1-sigma. BGS = Bright Galaxy Survey, LRG = Luminous Red Galaxies, ELG = Emission Line Galaxies, QSO = Quasars, Lya = Lyman-alpha forest.

columns.D_V_over_rd: Angle-averaged distance D_V divided by the sound horizon r_d
columns.tracer: Galaxy tracer type used for the measurement
